messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0152",
  "title": "实用工具",
  "page_index": 44,
  "page_range": "44"
}

Section text:
## 实用工具

ShareMe

WPS Office

CamScanner

Seekee

CapCut

EasyShare

UC Browser

File Recovery

Xender

Meitu

message.content: This section provides a categorized list of applications under the topic "实用工具" (Practical Tools). It can answer entity-identification questions such as "Which software applications are classified as practical tools in this document?" or "Is [specific app name] included in the utilities list?" The content consists exclusively of ten named entities: ShareMe, WPS Office, CamScanner, Seekee, CapCut, EasyShare, UC Browser, File Recovery, Xender, and Meitu. The section contains no dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
